items.title: The Knicks went from having the fifth-best point differential in the 2025-26 regular season to having the best point differential ever in the playoffs.
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks went from having the fifth-best point differential in the 2025-26 regular season to having the best point differential ever in the playoffs.

I'm still a bit shocked. Look at those teams behind them.
